summary: Frontend testing blocked by authentication requirement. Login form functionality verified but cannot access protected pages (/tour-list, /tour-request, /hotels/:id/edit) without valid credentials.

authentication_issues.issue: All target pages require authentication but no test credentials provided

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test tour list, tour request, and hotel edit functionality due to authentication wall

passed_tests: Authentication system responds to login attempts
action_item_for_main_agent: Provide valid test credentials (admin email/password) to enable testing of tour-list, tour-request, and hotel edit pages. Current testing is blocked by authentication requirement.
